data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for max download attempts per entitlement/purchase.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'Max download attempts per entitlement/purchase', which is not directly supported by any of the prior steps or evidence provided. While the linked use case mentions the need for a maximum of 5 downloads, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction that confirms this limit is enforced or validated. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of max download attempts being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
